question: What is the optimal submission strategy for registering TIAMAT on three agent directories (https://aiagentsdirectory.com/submit-agent, https://agent.ai, https://aiagentstore.ai) to maximize reach and engagement, given the current $0.24 revenue threshold and the constraint that ask_claude_code should only be used during strategic bursts (BUILD cycle)?
response:
